perks.summary: combine ordered slide images (PNG/JPG/...) into a single PDF deck (local, Pillow)
rasterize a presentation PDF into per-slide images for visual review (local, PyMuPDF)
validate a PDF/PPTX/TEX deck for slide count vs duration, dimensions, font sizes (local)
generate a full slide or visual image from a natural-language prompt via Nano Banana Pro (OpenRouter API)
generate a scientific schematic/diagram from a natural-language prompt via Nano Banana 2 (OpenRouter API)
